top_signals.title: There’s a Bug in the Gold Trade as Miners Move Like Meme Stocks
top_signals.summary: Brian Laks has been investing in gold stocks for over a decade. To the deep-value investor, they serve as a hedge against volatility in the rest of his portfolio, a haven during geopolitical uncertainty and deliver steady returns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
